data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the certification requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the certification requirement that users must be certified divers. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding whether the users have the necessary certification. The linked use case mentions certification requirements but lacks specific evidence to confirm that this requirement was satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming that users are certified divers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the certification requirement.
